name: cerebro
description: Grill requirements, model domain language, design architecture, and scaffold an evidence-governed project for Codex and Claude.

interface.shortDescription: Grill, scaffold, and govern AI-ready projects.
interface.longDescription: Cerebro turns a rough software idea into validated requirements, sharpens domain language, designs proportionate module boundaries and interfaces, scaffolds the project, and installs durable guardrails and independent review workflows for Codex and Claude.
defaultPrompt: Grill this project idea until it is ready to build.
Audit this repository for AI development readiness.
Review this implementation plan before coding.
